data.Name: Traumatic
data.Description: This is a powerfully negative experience for the Characters involved.
data.Character_Effect: The Card atop the Discard Pile acts as a Stress Card. The Character effected must spend Stress equal to the Pips of the Card to accept the Stress effect or the Card will become a Trauma.

data.Name: Fray
data.Description: This is a Yarn Fray event, typically narrated by the Yarn-Teller responsible for the Character's Arc.
data.Character_Effect: The Card atop the Discard Pile acts as a Fray that will affect the Characters during this Beat or Bar.

data.Name: Snag
data.Description: This is a Yarn Snag event, typically narrated by the Yarn-Teller responisible for the Character's Arc.
data.Character_Effect: The Card atop the Discard Pile acts as a Snag that will affect the Characters during this Beat or Bar.

data.Name: Hurdle
data.Description: This is a Facet Hurdle event, typically narrated by the Yarn-Teller responsible for the Character's Arc.
data.Character_Effect: The Card atop the Discard Pile provides a Facet Hurdle that will effect the Characters during this Beat or Bar.

data.Name: Negative Emotion
data.Description: There is a Negative Emotion associated with the current situation, this effect is typically narrated by the Player of the Character affected.
data.Character_Effect: The Card atop the Discard Pile becomes +1 Card Negative Emotional Effect that affects the Characters with a Psych Attack Emotional Effect during this Beat or Bar.

data.Name: Failure
data.Description: There is an air of failure about the situation. This effect is usually narrated by the Referee.
data.Character_Effect: The Referee may either narrate the Card atop the Discard Pile as a Facet Failure Level or demand the Character must Discard a Card from their Hand or Pool as the Failure for each Action the Character takes during the Beat or Bar.

data.Name: Home
data.Description: This is where the Character is naturallly at home. It may be literally their territory, but most likely it is the social and geographical situation to which they are habituated.
data.Character_Effect: Adds +1 Generic Success Level that the Player may add to each Action the Character takes during the Beat or Bar.

data.Name: Stressful
data.Description: The situation around the Character is stressful for them.
data.Character_Effect: The Character Gains Stress during the Beat or each Beat of the Bar.

data.Name: Positive Emotion
data.Description: There is a Positive Emotion associated with the current situation, this effect is typically narrated by the Player of the Character affected.
data.Character_Effect: The Card atop the Discard Pile becomes +1 Card Positive Emotional Effect that affects the Characters with an Emotional Effect during this Beat or Bar.

data.Name: Relief
data.Description: This is a restful situation that allows a Character to rest and recuperate.
data.Character_Effect: The Character can rest, this will usually Relieve all current Stress, Strain and Shock the Character has over the Bar.

data.Name: Revelation
data.Description: This is a Yarn Revelation Event, typically narrated by the Yarn-Teller responsible for the Character's Arc.
data.Character_Effect: The Card atop the Discard Pile acts as a Revelation (which may be expanded by the Yarn-Teller with additional cards and may create a Lore for the Character) this Revelation plays out over the Beat or Bar.

data.Name: Gain
data.Description: This is a Yarn Gain Event, typically narrated by the Yarn-Teller responsible for the Character's Arc.
data.Character_Effect: The Card atop the Discard Pile acts as a Gain Event that plays out over the Beat or Bar.
